title: orianthera pusilla
intro: Orianthera pusilla, also known as the Small Starflower or Starflower, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and aiding in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Orianthera pusilla are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures for their medicinal properties.
